content:
# Bronze Savings Account Terms

## Account Profile
Bronze Savings Account is a Northstar Bank deposit product for personal customers. It is classified as a savings account, so use it only in savings-account comparisons and recommendations. For side-by-side positioning against other savings products, see "Savings Account Comparison Guide".

## Pricing and Opening Requirements
| Attribute | Term |
|---|---|
| Monthly fee | 0 |
| Fee waiver balance | 0 |
| APY | 1.13 |
| Minimum opening deposit | 100 |

A customer must be prepared to fund at least the minimum opening deposit before the account can be treated as ready to open. Do not describe any extra tier, promotional rate, or relationship discount for this product.

## Closure Timing
If a Bronze Savings Account is closed within 60 days after opening, the early closure fee is 20. If the closure request is outside that window, this article does not add an early closure charge. For employee handling steps, use "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy".
title: Bronze Savings Account Terms
